ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "revenue_range" TEXT /* Revenue range */,
  "founded_by" TEXT /* Founders of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitors" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the competitor is related to */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship type (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "competitor_type" TEXT /* Type of competitor (e.g., traditional, digital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitors_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., funding round, acquisition) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the transaction (e.g., Series A, Asset Sale) */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding amount in millions */,
  "mosaic_score" INTEGER /* Mosaic score (a metric used to evaluate the company's potential) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "investors_involved" TEXT /* List of investors involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the funding round is part of */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding round (e.g., Series A, Seed VC) */,
  "round_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding in millions */,
  "investor_ids" TEXT /* IDs of investors involved in the funding round */,
  "round_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding round */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., VC, Angel, Corporate) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the investor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the investor */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding provided by the investor */,
  "focus_areas" TEXT /* Areas of focus for the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisitions" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the acquisition is part of */,
  "acquirer_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the acquiring company */,
  "target_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target company being acquired */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of the acquisition */,
  "acquisition_amount" REAL /* Amount of the acquisition in millions */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* Type of acquisition (e.g., Asset Sale, Reverse Merger) */,
  "integration_status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_acquirer_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquirer_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_target_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the company is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_name FOREIGN KEY ("location_name") REFERENCES transactions ("location")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_round_investors" (
  "round_investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round investor relationship */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding round */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of investment in millions */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_round_investors_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_round_investors_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Revenue, User Growth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., dollars, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "valuation_amount" REAL /* Valuation amount in millions */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date the valuation was recorded */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., DCF, Market Multiple) */,
  "valuation_multiple" REAL /* Multiple used for valuation (e.g., revenue multiple, EBITDA multiple) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_valuations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "financial_year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue in millions */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Annual expenses in millions */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Annual net income in millions */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets in millions */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities in millions */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity in millions */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Annual cash flow in millions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Viewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page (e.g., about, team) */,
  "page_content" TEXT /* Content of the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_pages_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
